sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Selection
special_mechanics.description: Players select from various toy vehicles including formula one cars, powerboats, helicopters, and tanks with different handling characteristics

special_mechanics.name: Track Boundaries
special_mechanics.description: Predefined race paths with automatic reset if player leaves defined route for too long

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Some vehicles (tanks) can shoot other racers, affecting race dynamics

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/Qualitative data only. Micro Machines is a top-down racing game centered around toy vehicles in miniaturized environments. No precise physics parameters (gravity, acceleration, velocities) are documented in available sources. The game emphasizes gameplay variety through environmental design and vehicle selection rather than detailed movement mechanics. Genesis port released July 1993 (EU) / September 1993 (NA).
